actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component (id: 265568265) on Elevator (1) uses script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77 (AttachToElevator) with serialized field 'player' set to fileID 7425022. Elevator (1) has a BoxCollider (id: 265568267) with m_IsTrigger = 1. When a Rigidbody-backed collider (ideally the 'player' GameObject, fileID: 7425022) enters this trigger, Unity will invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter(Collider other). Expected behavior per code: IF (gameObject == player) THEN player.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, true); ELSE no change. Note: Scene meta shows no m_Calls (Interactable events), so collider entry/exit must be triggered via physics interaction.

MonoBehaviour component (id: 265568265) on Elevator (1) uses script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77 (AttachToElevator) with serialized field 'player' set to fileID 7425022. Elevator (1) has a BoxCollider (id: 265568267) with m_IsTrigger = 1. When the same Rigidbody-backed collider exits this trigger, Unity will invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit(Collider other). Expected behavior per code: IF (gameObject == player) THEN player.transform.parent = null; ELSE no change.
